programmes.show_description: Forensics are called to a terrifying scene at a family home: a 33-year-old man has been fatally stabbed in his kitchen. Police embark on a huge manhunt to find who is responsible.
In 1989, Mandy Stavik disappears while jogging. Her body is found in a river. The case goes cold until 2013, when DNA evidence connects local man Timothy Bass to the murder.
When Hollie Gazzard, a hairdresser with a bright future, parted ways with her controlling lover, she had no idea that a day of at the salon would end with a savage knife attack.
In this sporty episode, a boxing coach has a lipoma that looks like an out-of-place ab, and a gym fanatic has lumps on his arms that friends have mistaken for odd-shaped muscles.
The Eggheads find themselves quizzing against "The Mighty Wanderers."
The "Baize Brains" eye the rolling prize pool as they face the Eggheads.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Shop by phone from the comfort of your home.
Visit Thane.tv and browse our selection of award winning home and fitness products that let you do more with less!
Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
We meet children's party entertainer Natalie, who is striving to be the "Queen of parties" on the Costa Del Sol.
Removals man Simon follows his dream of turning his photography side-hustle into his main gig.
In Chelsea, a female shoplifter is compliant at first, but then she tries to do a runner. And meet the former shoplifter who now works with shopkeepers to prevent their losses. (Ep6)
Chasing a car that has been connected to a string of catalytic converter thefts turns deadly as one of the suspect occupants hurls a pole at the traffic cops.
Near Chesterfield, PC Dave McAllister arrives at a motorbike accident on one of the county's fast roads. Reports suggest the rider hit a bird.
Derbyshire's traffic cops deal with danger on the county's motorways and fast roads. Traffic cop Dave McAllister and a team of other officers are on the M1 following a stolen HGV.
A torrential downpour hampers police at a major crash scene on the M1, and PC Ange Salous confronts a not-so-happy chappy.
An armed drink-driver leads the interceptors through a graveyard. A man is given a lesson in road safety after attempting to use a moped as a minibus.
Ange stands up to a couple of heavyweights and Craig is unimpressed by one man's feeble attempt to disguise his identity.
A gang use a broken-down ice-cream van to try and scam thousands of pounds. Secret filming reveals a fraudster's grossly exaggerated injuries.
Tane and Harper go head-to-head. Kerrie's lies cause friction. Mali extends an olive branch.
Kerrie's apology is too little, too late. Harper backs Tane. David learns a shocking truth.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. The doctors and nurses treat wounds as much emotional as physical.
Junior Doctor Tom's first patient is 18-year-old Lewis who has broken bones and deep wounds from a moped accident - but causing him the most pain is his fear of needles.
Patients in need of emergency assistence include a man in cardiac arrest at a karate club, a 83-year-old woman with a suspected broken thigh, and a truck driver trapped in his cabin.
A 69-year-old fisherman is brought into resus helicopter after an accident out at sea; a man is bleeding in his brain after being hit with a lorry.
Two ladies keep Dr Dev Shah busy: one has a large lipoma on her back, the other a cyst on her forehead. 19-year-old Abby hopes Dr Natalia Spierings can rid her of lumps on her ears.
When dreams turn into plastic surgery nightmares.
Dr Gareth James sees his first ever case of 'whiplash by canine'. William's family struggles to cope with his self-harm. Mohammed is at high risk for heart disease.
Barnsley Casualty is facing one of its toughest shifts to date. With no children's beds available across the whole of Yorkshire, and a department filling up with children.
Dr Emma McMullen operates on a strange pectoral lipoma. Forty-three-year-old Tamzin visits Dr Natalia Spierings who's a specialist in her skin condition, melasma.
The Eggheads compete against the "Seven Hills Students" in a quiz contest.

Shop JML, the home for clever ideas.
We meet Janette and her partner, Ray, who enjoy their new life in Spain after retiring from the UK 11 years ago. Janette now runs her candle and wax melts business from their home.
Looking back at some of the best bits of the series, we see best friends and neighbours Bambi and Johnny return from their new home in Huelva.
In Newton Abbot, undercover detective Nush spots a suspicious character in the crowds. She tails the suspect into a card shop but there's a problem - the suspect has disappeared.
On patrol in Derbyshire, the traffic cops tackle a huge variety of criminals, ranging from drunk or drugged drivers to violent county lines drug dealers and organised crime gangs.
One officer narrowly escapes serious injury as he attempts to open the driver's door only for the suspect to suddenly speed off pulling him along the road.
Derbyshire's roads, a magnet for bikers of all kinds, prove to be a nightmare for traffic cops. A motorcycle versus car crash ends up fatal.
A dangerous drug dealer lets far more than the cat out of the bag and name-swapping friends leave the interceptors baffled.
Mac stops a driver for having no insurance and unearths a huge drugs haul, and the chopper tracks down two notorious burglars.
Phil pulls over a Lamborghini that is not all that it seems to be. Mac comes face to face with a gang, and Ange encounters a four-legged foe.
A traveller's account of being robbed at gunpoint turns out to be a lie. When a man's cellar floods with raw sewage the smell of fraud is unmistakable.
Kerrie's apology is too little, too late. Harper backs Tane. David learns a shocking truth.
A shocking diagnosis is revealed. Leah turns to Alf for help. Eden's concerned for her friend.
Documentary series filmed inside the Ridge Medical Practice in Bradford. Jeanette has resorted to smoking marijuana to help alleviate her chronic pain.
A fire alarm begins evacuation efforts; a man with potential spine injuries is given pain relief while waiting for scan results.
Kettering v Telford have a bloody history off the pitch so cops are braced for trouble. And officers who spot a drug deal, unearth an Interpol arrest warrant for a criminal. (Ep2)
Cara has fallen 50 metres down a waterfall. She has multiple obvious injuries that need urgent care, but Dr Richard Fawcett must also investigate hidden internal injuries.
